name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Spectrum Lowgain Lamb & Blueberry For Mini And Small Breed Adult Dogs 2.5kg
shortDescription: SPECTRUM LOW GRAIN LAMB AND BLUEBERRY is a Complete and balanced food for Mini and Small Breed Adult Dogs
description: SPECTRUM LOW GRAIN COMPLETE AND BALANCED FOOD WITH LAMB & BLUEBERRY FORMULA FOR MINI AND SMALL BREED ADULT DOGS INGREDIENTS:? Dehydrated animal protein (lamb protein min. 26% ), cereals (rice, corn, oat), chicken fat, whey powder, sugar cane fiber, hydrolyzed lamb protein, carob meal, pea starch, brewery's yeast, salt, blueberry, chia seed, L-carnitine, xylooligosaccharides (XOS), yucca schidigera, dried egg powder, turmeric, artichoke, olive, red onion, blackberry, tomato, watermelon, pomegranate, thym, rosemary, ginger extracts. MINERALS/kg: ?Iron(E1)? 150 mg, Iodin(E2) 1,5 mg, Copper(E4) 15 mg, Mangenese(E5) 70 mg, Zinc(E6) 180 mg, Selenium(E8) 0,3 mg. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS NUTRITIVE ADDITIONS Crude Protein 30% Vitamin A (E672) 18000 IU Crude Fat 18% Vitamin D3(E671) ?1500 IU Crude Ash 9% Vitamin E (3A700) 150 mg Crude Cellulose (Fiber) 5,5% Vitamin C (Stay C) 200 mg Daily Recommended Amount (g) : Adult Dog Weight 2 kg 3 kg? 4 kg 5 kg 6 kg 7 kg 8 kg 9 kg 10 kg Dog's Profile Thin 50 - 60 80 - 90 100 - 110 115 - 125 130 - 145 145 - 165 160 - 175 175 - 200 190 - 210 Normal 50 - 55 70 - 80 85 - 95 100 - 110 110 - 125 125 - 140 140 - 155 155 - 170 170 - 185 Overweight 45 - 50 60 - 70 75 - 85 85 - 95 100 - 110 110 - 120 120 - 135 135 - 150 145 - 160
